releases.title: Extensions, member photos & documentation
releases.summary: Custom entities and custom analytics APIs, member profile photos with avatar generation, and a three-audience documentation site (product, developers, contributors).

changes.title: Member profile photos
changes.description: Upload a photo or generate an initials avatar from the member profile page (JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF, max 500KB).

changes.title: Custom entities API
changes.description: Define per-gym record types and store JSON records without schema migrations.

changes.title: Custom analytics API
changes.description: Save and run reusable metrics over members, payments, attendance, or custom entity records.

changes.title: Operator documentation guides
changes.description: Structured product guides at /docs — getting started, daily operations, renewals, configuration, FAQ, and WhatsApp templates.

changes.title: Documentation site split
changes.description: Product guides at /docs, developer portal at /developers, OSS architecture at /docs/architecture.

changes.title: OpenAPI updated
changes.description: openapi.json includes new extension and member photo routes.

changes.title: Developers portal restored
changes.description: Full API reference, playground, data models, MCP section, and release notes.

releases.title: Initial open-source release
releases.summary: Fitness360 / Gymkhana core — members, payments, attendance, billing, WhatsApp reminders, multi-gym tenancy, and marketplace installs.

changes.title: Member & membership management
changes.description: Admit members, plans, renewals, overdue tracking, and payment history.

changes.title: Attendance & QR check-in
changes.description: Manual and QR-based check-in with dashboard stats.

changes.title: Payments & billing
changes.description: Record payments, bills, collections dashboard, and expense tracking.

changes.title: WhatsApp reminders
changes.description: Meta Cloud API integration for renewal nudges and campaigns.

changes.title: Multi-gym tenancy
changes.description: Account-scoped gyms with RBAC and gymId isolation on all tenant data.

changes.title: Session-authenticated REST API
changes.description: ~165 dashboard API routes with domain-driven handlers.

changes.title: Preview v1 API
changes.description: GET /api/v1/members and cashflow with x-api-key authentication.

changes.title: In-dashboard marketplace
changes.description: Optional installs: Razorpay, class booking, member portal, and more.
